current_run.description: Given an oracle that computes f(x) = (s1*x^2 + s2*x + s3) mod p for a prime p, where s1, s2, s3 are secret coefficients and x is an N-bit integer, find s1, s2, s3. This is a quadratic congruence, but with an emphasis on differences of inputs to probe the quadratic nature non-linearly.
